data.body:
=== MIGRATION COMPLETE ===
Bash->Python strangler-fig migration done across all tiers (A-E). The story's end-state AC is met: ONE implementation + three facades (lib/CLI/MCP); zero _engine/*.sh; no embedded heredocs; zero standalone shell tests. The bash dispatcher + 36 .sh + helpers + shims + ticket_txn are deleted (commit e3507895); the reconciler + Jira probe + wordlist are the only engine package-data left, launched as subprocesses. Verified: full suite 1675 passed/0 failed; integration 8 passed; live DIG reconcile dry-run + bridge-probe green; all 3 interfaces dogfooded. Closing.
